metadata.title: No, I Don't Just Type a Prompt — The Real Process Behind AI Content

metadata.note: HAI Fellows batch v2 — Teardown register, @NikBearBrown, Remotion animated bookends. Credit: Nik Bear Brown — Founder, Humanitarians AI. HONESTY: all numbers trace to source article.

beats.narration_text: Let's recap with Claude. The surprising part is that typing a prompt is the last step, not the first. The source material gets read first, so understanding precedes any generation. AI can write pretty good content, but it often needs half the draft rewritten. By the time anything is typed into the tool, most of the real work is already done.

props.artifactTitle: The real process behind AI content
artifactLines: The surprising part is that typing a prompt is the last step, not the first.
The source material gets read first, so understanding precedes any generation.
AI can write pretty good content, but it often needs half the draft rewritten.
By the time anything is typed into the tool, most of the real work is already done.

beats.narration_text: The surprise for me was that by the time anything gets typed into the tool, most of the work is already done, because the source material was read first. I want to adopt that discipline. Help me: (1) take one topic and do the full source read before writing a single prompt; (2) generate a draft, then mark exactly which half needs rewriting and why; (3) build a repeatable checklist that front-loads the thinking so the AI finishes work I've already framed.

props.segment: No, I Don't Just Type a Prompt — The Real Process Be
props.command: The surprise for me was that by the time anything gets typed into the tool, most of the work is already done, because the source material was read first. I want to adopt that discipline. Help me: (1) take one topic and do the full source read before writing a single prompt; (2) generate a draft, then mark exactly which half needs rewriting and why; (3) build a repeatable checklist that front-loads the thinking so the AI finishes work I've already framed.
output: This is the part that surprises people
I read the source material first
That part isn’t optional and AI can’t do it for me
